title: userDetailsReducer.js — profileAuthSuccess initial value set to true
commit_message: fix: align initial profileAuthSuccess with persisted session bootstrap

why_user_details_only.explanation: Only userDetailsReducer.js changes. CRITICAL = every test whose symbols[] includes userDetailsReducer (6 tests). profileReducer.js is in the same feature file but has disjoint sources[] — those tests are HIGH under a same-file defensive policy (scenario 12 profile-only narrative, inverted).
why_user_details_only.key_point: 6 CRITICAL + 4 HIGH = 10 selected; 67 SKIP — single feature file, two reducer describes.

tests.test: userDetailsReducer > initialises with data as an empty array
tests.result: ⚠️  MAY FAIL — initial profileAuthSuccess may break assertions that assumed false

tests.test: userDetailsReducer > SUCCESS action populates data and token from the payload
userDetailsReducer > UPDATEREFRESHEDTOKEN updates token and loginTime independently
userDetailsReducer > ONAUTHENTICATE resets profileAuthSuccess to false
userDetailsReducer > SHOWLOGGEDOUTSHEET stores the payload in showLoggedOutSheet
userDetailsReducer > returns unchanged state for an unknown action type
profileReducer > initialises with an empty profileData array
profileReducer > PROFILESDETAILS action replaces profileData with the new list
profileReducer > SAVESELECTEDPROFILEDETAILS stores the chosen profile
profileReducer > returns current state unchanged for an unrecognised action

SKIP.reason: userDetailsReducer.js not in sources[] for other suites

coverage_gaps.detail: Initial state test should assert profileAuthSuccess if that field is now part of the public contract.
